page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the National Post (Toronto, Ontario, Canada), dated Saturday, April 28, 2001, page 37. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

The National Post is one of Canada's major national newspapers. By April 2001, Dick's cultural influence was substantial, with the film Minority Report (starring Tom Cruise, directed by Steven Spielberg) in production for a June 2002 release. The spring 2001 date may relate to preview coverage of upcoming Dick adaptations, retrospective literary criticism, or discussion of Dick's growing canonical status in a major Canadian broadsheet.
